title: Updated tag search syntax in workspace search
body: The workspace search syntax for searching tables and views by tag has been updated. To search by both tag key and value, use the syntax `tag:<tag_key>:<tag_value>`. Previously, the syntax was to omit `tag:` when searching by both key and value. To search by tag key alone, continue using `tag:<tag_key>`. See [Use tags to search](/aws/en/search#tags).
